confirm_timeout.label: Preview Timeout
confirm_timeout.description: Seconds before an unconfirmed output preview is reverted

limits.first_eight_outputs: Only the first eight outputs can be edited in this preview build

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.description: Turn this output on or off; at least one connected output must remain enabled

mode.label: Mode
mode.description: Set the output resolution and exact refresh rate reported by Niri

vrr.label: Variable Refresh Rate
vrr.supported_description: Enable variable refresh rate (VRR) for this output
vrr.unsupported_description: Variable refresh rate is not supported

scale.label: Scale
scale.description: Set the scale of the output; fractional values are supported

transform.label: Transform
transform.description: Rotate the output counter-clockwise or flip it

position.label: Position
position.description: Set the output position in the global coordinate space, in logical pixels

preview.unapplied_changes: Changes are not applied until Preview is pressed

status.outputs_arranged: Outputs arranged left to right in the draft
status.draft_reset: Draft reset to the current Niri output state
status.preview_applied: Preview applied — confirm it before the countdown expires
status.saving_settings: Validating and saving the Niri output configuration…
status.preview_timed_out: Preview timed out and the previous output configuration was restored
status.ready: Edit an output, then use Preview to test it safely

errors.backend_start: Could not start the Niri Outputs backend
errors.invalid_output_list: Niri returned an invalid output list
errors.encode_draft: Could not encode the output draft
errors.write_draft: Could not save the output draft
errors.preview: Could not preview the output configuration
errors.save: Could not save the output configuration
errors.revert: Could not revert the output configuration

backend_errors.unexpected_output_document: Niri returned an unexpected output document
backend_errors.read_draft: Could not read the output draft: {detail}
backend_errors.draft_outputs_array: The output draft must contain an outputs array
backend_errors.invalid_connector_name: Output {index} has an invalid connector name
backend_errors.numeric_scale_position: {name}: scale and position must be numeric
backend_errors.one_output_required: At least one output must remain enabled
backend_errors.create_preview_files: Could not create the temporary output preview: {detail}
backend_errors.read_preview_file: Could not read the temporary output preview: {detail}
backend_errors.read_main_config: Could not read the normal Niri configuration: {detail}
backend_errors.managed_display_include: The normal Niri configuration must contain exactly one managed output include
backend_errors.read_preview_state: Could not read the output preview state: {detail}
backend_errors.update_preview_state: Could not update the output preview state: {detail}
backend_errors.remove_preview_state: Could not remove the output preview files: {detail}
backend_errors.invalid_preview_state: The output preview state is invalid
backend_errors.config_load_timeout: Timed out waiting for Niri to finish loading its configuration
backend_errors.config_event_stream_ended: The Niri event stream ended before configuration loading completed
backend_errors.config_event_stream_start: Could not start the Niri configuration event stream: {detail}
backend_errors.watchdog_start: Could not start the output rollback watchdog: {detail}
backend_errors.preview_restore_pending: {reason}; switching back to the normal Niri configuration is still pending
backend_errors.preview_inactive: The output preview is no longer active
backend_errors.preview_not_active: The output preview is not ready to keep
backend_errors.restore_config_file: Could not restore the prior Niri output configuration: {detail}
backend_errors.install_config_file: Could not install the Niri output configuration: {detail}
backend_errors.different_preview_active: A different output preview is active
